---
title: Llama.cpp Model Deployment 
---

### 1.17.0
* Improve security
* Fix app instance fails when run using the queue with GPU fractions generated by CFGI

### 1.15.0

**New Features**
* Add application gateway static routes support
* Add 'Tokens per Second' metric graph in app instance dashboard

### 1.13.0

**New Feature**
* Initial version: Deploy LLMs in GGUF format using llama.cpp
